title: anisopappus lejolyanus
intro:
Anisopappus lejolyanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Anisopappus lejolyanus plant or Lejoly's anisopappus, native to the Democratic Republic of Congo.

This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Anisopappus lejolyanus include its antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
